title: Supreme Court seeks Central government's response to plea challenging validity of NIA Act
description: The Supreme Court on Tuesday issued notice to the Union government on a plea challenging the constitutional validity of the National Investigation Agency Act, 2008 (NIA Act) [Mohammed Mubarak AI Versus Union Of India And Ors.]. A Bench of Justices Vikram Nath and Sandeep Mehta said the issues raised in the plea involved questions of wide national importance concerning the powers exercised by the National Investigation Agency (NIA).“If NIA doesn’t have power to register F
